diff: Expected >=3/5; achieved 4/5. C4 reduced from 240s lag to 0s. Mean lag: actual=56s monitor=1.6s (35x improvement). L-1008 caveat: tool detects correlated bug clusters not architectural cascades — consistent with L-1008.
